Description: Original HiL-Bench SWE-agent on the same test set <-- performance we want to recreate
Added ask_human guidance to system prompt (*_swe)
Rationale: To encourage agents to ask questions

Description: Added ignore clause to system prompt, also same time that we started using xhigh (*_swe_xhigh(_pathfix))
Rationale: Codex base system prompt (un-modifiable) discourages asking questions + to cover any prompting that might discourage other agents from asking

Description: Simple skill with basically same instructions as the ask_human guidance "rules for using the tool" (*_swe_skill)
Rationale: Initial skill, have it repeat information in the system prompt since repetition is good for agents

Description: Detailed skill with question-asking tool rules, and remove those rules from system prompt (*_swe_skill2)
Rationale: Have the skill be more of a walkthrough guide, based on CC skill examples

Description: Add examples of blockers/when to use in system prompt + skill description, put back ask_human guidance in system prompt (*_swe_skill3)
Rationale: Simple skill had overall better P/R. Agents CAN use skill just not effectively --> need to focus on improving recall. Details in system prompt seem important (at least for codex). ADK and OpenCode seem well enough. Claude-code especially struggles on missing params compared to swe-agent, but all struggle on ambig overall.

Description: Alina PR — custom tool baseline (*_swe_customtool, PR #1)
Rationale: Custom MCP ask_human; 20-UID ask_human metrics from acceptance baselines (https://github.com/melfeki-11/trust_horizon/pull/1). Pass@k not in repo—backfill if available.
System/skill guidance for ask_human; 20-UID P/R from acceptance baselines. Pass@k not in repo—backfill if available.

Description: Layered tweaks A+B+D on top of Alina's PR (*_swe_skill7)
Rationale: TodoWriteTool seed + CLAUDE.md per-task hint + rich custom MCP ask tool description. 2-UID ablation showed Claude R: 0.29 -> 0.71 (+0.42), Codex R: 0.38 -> 0.92 (+0.54) over the PR baseline; Codex pass@1 0.33 -> 0.83.

Description: Skill8 precision recovery on Skill7 ABD (*_swe_skill8)
Rationale: SOFTEN_CATEGORY_MANDATE + optional MAX_ASKS_PER_PASS + IRRELEVANT_COOLDOWN; see smoke_logs/skill8_ablation_summary.md for 2-UID winner.

Description: Skill9 Pareto split profile on Skill7 ABD (*_swe_skill9)
Rationale: 2-UID ablation winner split: Codex SOFTEN only (H); Claude soften+MAX_ASKS_PER_PASS=5 (HE). Beats both Alina custom-tool and skill+guidance on 2 UID; see smoke_logs/skill9_ablation_summary.md.
